nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain and patchy fog. Cloudy. Low around 39, with temperatures rising to around 52 overnight. South wind 18 to 23 mph, with gusts as high as 61 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 47. West wind 14 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 33 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 23. West wind 10 to 14 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 38. West wind 6 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 28. South wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 44. South wind 6 to 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Mostly Cloudy then Slight Chance Rain Showers
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain showers after 4am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 33. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Snow Showers then Slight Chance Rain Showers
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of snow showers before 9am, then a slight chance of rain showers. Mostly sunny, with a high near 50. Southwest wind 7 to 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 34. West wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain showers. Partly sunny, with a high near 45. Northwest wind around 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Rain Showers then Chance Snow Showers
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain showers before 4am, then a chance of snow showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 31. Southwest wind around 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Snow Showers then Chance Rain Showers
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of snow showers before 9am, then a chance of rain showers. Partly sunny, with a high near 44. Southwest wind around 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Rain Showers then Chance Snow Showers
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain showers before 1am, then a chance of snow showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 29. West wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Snow Showers then Mostly Sunny
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of snow showers before 10am, then a slight chance of rain showers between 10am and 11am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 44. Northwest wind around 14 mph.

alerts.headline: High Wind Warning issued March 16 at 3:00PM EDT until March 17 at 6:00AM EDT by NWS Boston/Norton MA
alerts.description:
* WHAT...South winds 20 to 30 mph with gusts up to 65 mph expected.

* WHERE...Portions of eastern, northeastern, and southeastern
Massachusetts and northern and southern Rhode Island.

* WHEN...Until 6 AM EDT Tuesday.

* IMPACTS...Damaging winds will blow down trees and power lines.
Power outages are possible. Travel will be difficult, especially
for high profile vehicles.
